validation_rules.Passport: Must be valid for travel to the United States. Expiration date must be at least six months beyond the student's period of stay.
validation_rules.Form I-20: Must be officially signed by the DSO and the student. Program start date must not be in the past.
validation_rules.SEVIS Fee: Receipt for I-901 payment ($350 for F-1 visa) must match SEVIS ID from Form I-20.
validation_rules.Bank Statements: Must show liquid funds sufficient to cover the total expenses for one year as listed on the I-20 (includes tuition, fees, and living cost).

critical_rules: SEVIS ID on fee receipt and Form I-20 must be identical.
DS-160 confirmation page must have a clear, scannable barcode.
Both DSO and applicant signatures must be present on Form I-20 page 1.
ai_instructions: Check for signature fields, compare SEVIS codes, and match bank statement balances against the I-20 cost estimates.
pass_examples: Form I-20 signed, SEVIS receipt matching N001234567, DS-160 barcode clear, bank statement shows $45,000 USD.
fail_examples: Form I-20 has no student signature, SEVIS ID does not match, Bank statement funds are illiquid (property values).
